summary: Completed testing of Account Performance Report feature. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed: page loads correctly, filters work, summary cards display, data table shows all required columns, row click navigates to account detail.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reports/account-performance - endpoint exists (200)
Backend: Response structure has 'accounts' and 'summary' fields

Backend: Account data has all required fields (account_id, account_name, account_type, city, state, territory, gross_invoice_total, net_invoice_total, bottle_credit, contribution_pct, outstanding_balance, overdue_amount, last_payment_amount)
Backend: Summary has all required fields (total_gross, total_net, total_bottle_credit, total_outstanding, total_overdue, account_count)
Backend: time_filter=this_month works
Backend: time_filter=lifetime works
Backend: time_filter=this_quarter works
Backend: time_filter=last_6_months works
Backend: territory filter works
Backend: state filter works
Backend: city filter works
Backend: account_type filter works
Backend: Combined filters work
Backend: Contribution percentage calculation is valid (<=100%)
Backend: Unauthenticated access denied (401)
Backend: Accounts sorted by gross_invoice_total descending
Frontend: Account Performance page accessible at /account-performance
Frontend: Account Performance appears in Dashboard submenu navigation
Frontend: Page header shows 'Account Performance' with description
Frontend: Filters section shows Time Period, Territory, State, City, Account Type
Frontend: Reset button clears all filters
Frontend: Summary cards display: GROSS TOTAL, NET TOTAL, BOTTLE CREDIT, OUTSTANDING, OVERDUE, ACCOUNTS
Frontend: Data table shows all required columns
Frontend: Territory filter updates account list (South India shows 2 accounts)
Frontend: Account Type filter works (Tier 1 shows 1 account)
Frontend: Clicking account row navigates to /accounts/{account_id}
Frontend: Account detail page loads correctly with all sections
critical_code_review_comments: Contribution % calculation is correct - based on filtered total gross revenue
Bottle Credit falls back to SKU pricing sum when no invoices exist (good design)
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
Accounts sorted by gross_invoice_total descending as expected
seed_data_creation: Used existing accounts: TOOP-HYD-A26-001 (Toopa Ice-creamery), LEAD-HYD-A26-001, EMPI-BEN-A26-001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account Performance feature is fully implemented. 3 accounts exist in the system. No invoices exist so all invoice totals show ₹0, but Bottle Credit shows values from SKU pricing (₹10 for Toopa Ice-creamery). Contribution % shows 0% when no invoices exist - this is correct behavior.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: N/A - Feature is newly implemented and working correctly
rca_of_the_issue.test_coverage: Tested all 8 features in the request: page accessible, navigation, filters (5 types), summary cards (6 metrics), data table (10 columns), API structure, contribution % calculation, row click navigation
